# Satoshi API

> Bitcoin fee intelligence for AI agents. Know when to send and what to pay.

Satoshi API saves agents money and time when interacting with Bitcoin.
Fee intelligence tells you whether to send now or wait. Payment
monitoring tells you when a transaction confirms. No node required.
Register a free API key and start querying in seconds.

## Why agents choose Satoshi API

- Fee intelligence: "send now or wait?" recommendations save money
  on every Bitcoin transaction
- Payment monitoring: know when a txid confirms without polling
- MCP server (pip install bitcoin-mcp) so Claude, GPT, and other
  LLM agents can call Bitcoin endpoints as native tools
- Clean JSON envelopes, consistent error formats, deterministic
  pagination — designed for programmatic consumption
- Free tier with no credit card — agents can self-register via
  POST https://bitcoinsapi.com/api/v1/register

## Quick start for agents

1. Register:
   POST https://bitcoinsapi.com/api/v1/register
   Body: {"email": "agent@example.com", "agreed_to_terms": true}
   Response includes your API key.

2. Query:
   GET https://bitcoinsapi.com/api/v1/fees/recommended
   Header: X-API-Key: <your_key>

3. Every response follows the same envelope:
   {"data": {...}, "meta": {"block_height": 900000, ...}}

## MCP integration (for AI agent frameworks)

Install: pip install bitcoin-mcp
Config: point at https://bitcoinsapi.com with your API key
Provides 35 tools, 6 prompts, and 7 resources that any
MCP-compatible agent can discover and invoke.

## Base URL

https://bitcoinsapi.com

## API docs (OpenAPI)

https://bitcoinsapi.com/docs

## Available endpoints

Fee intelligence (recommendations, landscape, history, alerts),
mempool analysis (congestion, fee buckets), blocks, transactions,
mining stats, UTXO lookups, network info, supply tracking,
address lookups, real-time streaming (SSE + WebSocket),
self-serve key registration.

## Rate limits

- Anonymous: lightweight GET only, 144-block cap
- Free: all endpoints, 144-block cap
- Pro: higher limits, 1008-block cap
- Enterprise: custom, 2016-block cap

## Contact

api@bitcoinsapi.com
